description: Sector overlay for federally incorporated not-for-profits, charities, foundations, associations, social enterprises, donor-funded bodies, and civil-society documentation in Canada.

metadata.scope: Canada-only sector overlay controls for NGO / Not-for-Profit. Intended to be used with canada_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official Canadian federal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time. Provincial/territorial obligations may apply and are not exhaustively encoded. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: Reporting obligations under Canada Not-for-profit Corporations Act
Creating a not-for-profit corporation and charity registration note
used_for: charitable purpose and CRA registration routing

primary_sources.name: Social enterprise / charities compliance guidance references
primary_sources.issuer: Innovation, Science and Economic Development Canada / CRA references

rules.title: Federal not-for-profit incorporation or governing-document evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for Canada Not-for-profit Corporations Act incorporation, articles, by-laws, certificate, or Corporations Canada evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Canadian legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, jurisdictional scope, provincial/territorial variations, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Annual return or corporate maintenance evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for annual return, registered office, directors, corporate maintenance, or Corporations Canada filing evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Canadian legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, jurisdictional scope, provincial/territorial variations, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: CRA charity registration or donation-receipting evidence is present where applicable
rules.summary: Checks for CRA charitable registration, official donation receipts, charitable purposes, or Income Tax Act routing.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Canadian legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, jurisdictional scope, provincial/territorial variations, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: ISED not-for-profit creation guidance and CRA charity routing

rules.title: Donor, beneficiary, member, or volunteer privacy controls are documented
rules.summary: Checks for donor, beneficiary, member, volunteer, privacy, consent, or personal information controls.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Canadian legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, jurisdictional scope, provincial/territorial variations, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: PIPEDA and Canadian privacy baseline; canada_core_control_library
